Skill Path: Jumping

Thanks to your thorough training your jumping ability is extraordinary.

While developing your skills in Athletics you chose to focus specifically on Jumping, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ZBhvJ9O8MvBFAlhq]{Quick Jump}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FJK7JTLSgugRIlvS]{Rapid Mantel}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ZBhvJ9O8MvBFAlhq]{Quick Jump}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FJK7JTLSgugRIlvS]{Rapid Mantel}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HJYQlmGTdtyGWr6a]{Powerful Leap}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X8iSUF1m0eezmrjs]{Wall Jump}
